positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a serene mountain vista at dawn. The scene features a perfect, clean silhouette of a single, majestic pine tree standing on a rolling hill, framed by soft, stylized mountains. The sky gradient transitions from deep indigo to soft peach and gold, featuring stylized, stylized celestial elements like abstract crescent moons and simple star clusters. The foreground should use solid, contrasting colors for high print visibility. The overall aesthetic must be clean, graphic, and suitable for screen printing on apparel, emphasizing clean lines, strong silhouettes, and a harmonious, calming color palette. Poster art style, vector illustration quality, high detail, centered composition.
